FlavourText.en: The last light at the end of the world.
FlavourText.zh: 世界尽头的最后一点微光。

FlavourText.en: Bright colours hide the rot beneath.
FlavourText.zh: 明艳的色彩掩盖了底下的腐朽。

FlavourText.en: Wild lands spurn those who claim to rule them.
FlavourText.zh: 荒芜之地唾弃那些自诩为统治者的人。

FlavourText.en: Time overwhelms even the sturdiest walls.
FlavourText.zh: 时光终将淹没最坚固的城墙。

FlavourText.en: Restless prisoners yearn for freedom.
FlavourText.zh: 不安的囚徒渴望着自由。

FlavourText.en: The grandest of monuments, standing proudly before an audience of none.
FlavourText.zh: 最宏伟的纪念碑，傲然矗立在没有观众的舞台上。

FlavourText.en: A haven for seabirds. A hazard for sailors.
FlavourText.zh: 海鸟的庇护所，水手的险途。

FlavourText.en: No living hands ever stoked these flames.
FlavourText.zh: 从无活人的手曾为这些火焰添薪。

FlavourText.en: Beasts of many kinds sought shelter one final time.
FlavourText.zh: 百兽最后一次在此寻求庇护。

FlavourText.en: These waters devour the same souls they feed.
FlavourText.zh: 这片水域既滋养灵魂，也吞噬灵魂。

FlavourText.en: The woods give their leaves to the seasons. Man takes the rest.
FlavourText.zh: 树林随季节更迭献出叶片，其余则尽归人类之手。

FlavourText.en: Humanity trapped within a cage of desperation and agony.
FlavourText.zh: 人类被困于绝望与痛苦的牢笼之中。

FlavourText.en: Leaves cling to trees as souls cling to life.
FlavourText.zh: 叶附于枝，如魂恋于生。

FlavourText.en: Sturdy walls held out an armada, but not the famine it brought.
FlavourText.zh: 坚固的城墙抵御了舰队，却未能抵挡随之而来的饥荒。

FlavourText.en: The last vestiges of earth, lost beyond the sky.
FlavourText.zh: 大地最后的残迹，迷失于苍穹之外。

FlavourText.en: Silent stones mark ancient graves and forgotten sorrows.
FlavourText.zh: 沉默的石头标记着古老的坟墓与被遗忘的哀伤。

FlavourText.en: Those killed in battle do not rest peacefully.
FlavourText.zh: 战死沙场者，不得安息。

FlavourText.en: The tears of a ravaged earth.
FlavourText.zh: 饱受摧残的大地流下的泪水。

FlavourText.en: The fetid home of foul generations.
FlavourText.zh: 污秽世代的恶臭家园。

FlavourText.en: Rushing waters threaten to move the earth.
FlavourText.zh: 湍急的流水誓要撼动大地。

FlavourText.en: Even the sparse vegetation does not linger here long.
FlavourText.zh: 连稀疏的植被也不会在此久留。

FlavourText.en: Stagnant oils mix to form a deadly concoction.
FlavourText.zh: 停滞的油料混合成致命的毒剂。

FlavourText.en: Vast lairs of silk span the treetops.
FlavourText.zh: 巨大的丝巢横跨树梢。

FlavourText.en: Darkness enshrouds these endless chasms.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗笼罩着无尽深渊。

FlavourText.en: Hubris convinces men they can survive the mistakes of their forebears.
FlavourText.zh: 狂妄使人相信，自己能逃脱先辈错误的覆辙。

FlavourText.en: Poisoned trees bear pestilent fruits.
FlavourText.zh: 毒树结恶果。

FlavourText.en: The ground shifts underfoot with disturbing ease.
FlavourText.zh: 脚下的大地轻易便会松动。

FlavourText.en: Shafts of light raise life where they fall.
FlavourText.zh: 光束落处，生命萌发。

FlavourText.en: A wound carved into the world, never to heal.
FlavourText.zh: 刻在世上的伤口，永远无法愈合。

FlavourText.en: The path grows treacherous as the world falls away.
FlavourText.zh: 随着世界分崩离析，前路也变得险恶。

FlavourText.en: They watched the birds to foretell what any fool could see.
FlavourText.zh: 他们观测鸟类的预兆，而愚者一目了然之事，他们却视而不见。

FlavourText.en: The final court for aristocrats no longer deemed fit to rule.
FlavourText.zh: 贵族们最后的法庭，他们已不再被认为适合统治。

FlavourText.en: Dark energies congeal the lifeblood of the forest.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗的能量凝结成森林的命脉。

FlavourText.en: Fishermen once reaped a rich bounty here.
FlavourText.zh: 渔民曾在此收获丰饶。

FlavourText.en: Spores dance through the air in search of new hosts.
FlavourText.zh: 孢子在空中舞动，寻觅新的宿主。

FlavourText.en: A city ravaged by time and sands.
FlavourText.zh: 被时光与黄沙摧残的城市。

FlavourText.en: Avarice in the conqueror builds contempt among the conquered.
FlavourText.zh: 征服者的贪婪，在被征服者心中种下仇恨。

FlavourText.en: The work of an invisible empire.
FlavourText.zh: 一个无形帝国的手笔。

FlavourText.en: Embers swirl as bark crackles and sparks.
FlavourText.zh: 余烬飞舞，树皮爆裂，火星四溅。

FlavourText.en: A dark labyrinth of steel and stone.
FlavourText.zh: 钢铁与岩石构筑的黑暗迷宫。

FlavourText.en: Hidden amongst sunbleached wastes lies a mockery of paradise.
FlavourText.zh: 隐匿于日光炙烤的废土之中，是对天堂的嘲弄。

FlavourText.en: Stone shelters brace against the doom of the desert.
FlavourText.zh: 石质掩体抵御着沙漠的毁灭之力。

FlavourText.en: Life abounds on the shells of its dead ancestors.
FlavourText.zh: 生命在其死去先祖的壳上蓬勃生长。

FlavourText.en: This Vaal structure is not lost in the jungle. Not yet.
FlavourText.zh: 这座瓦尔建筑尚未被丛林吞没，尚未。

FlavourText.en: A heart of corruption, borne of steel.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化的心脏，由钢铁所生。

FlavourText.en: A heart of corruption, borne of stone.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化的心脏，由岩石所生。

FlavourText.en: A heart of corruption, borne of copper.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化的心脏，由古铜所生。

FlavourText.en: Hulls crash and splinter upon the shores.
FlavourText.zh: 船体撞击海岸，碎裂四散。

FlavourText.en: Life grows strong in this realm of plenty.
FlavourText.zh: 生命在这片丰饶之地茁壮成长。

FlavourText.en: By that era, Kamasa was just a name. Gold was their true god.
FlavourText.zh: 那个时代，卡马萨不过是一个名字。黄金才是他们真正的神。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: The hunt never ends... but it does pause for rests.
FlavourText.zh: 狩猎永无止境……但确实也会歇歇脚。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: A travelling merchant offers wares in perilous times.
FlavourText.zh: 游商于危难之际，贩卖货物。

FlavourText.en: Vice wears a mask of simplicity.
FlavourText.zh: 恶习戴着朴素的面具。

FlavourText.en: Aeons of wear have rotted steel to its core.
FlavourText.zh: 万古侵蚀，钢铁已然朽烂。

FlavourText.en: Humid air chokes and twists everything it touches.
FlavourText.zh: 潮湿的空气令人窒息，扭曲其所触及的一切。

FlavourText.en: The land returns the dead as easily as it received them.
FlavourText.zh: 大地接纳亡者，一如来时那般轻易。

FlavourText.en: Mud and air seethes with warped life.
FlavourText.zh: 泥泞与空气中翻涌着扭曲的生命。

FlavourText.en: A fortress of fallen wood.
FlavourText.zh: 由朽木筑成的堡垒。

FlavourText.en: A forgotten grotto, lost to the world.
FlavourText.zh: 一处被世界遗忘的幽僻洞穴。

FlavourText.en: A fragment of a glorious past.
FlavourText.zh: 辉煌往昔的碎片。

FlavourText.en: A moment in time, on the eve of the end.
FlavourText.zh: 终结前夕的瞬间。

FlavourText.en: Wet stone emanates an inner warmth. Vaal brilliance lies in wait.
FlavourText.zh: 潮湿的岩石，内在的温热，都是瓦尔的智慧。

FlavourText.en: The waters have returned, but no empire remains to greet them.
FlavourText.zh: 潮水已归，却再无帝国相迎。

FlavourText.en: The cult of Kamasa exploited Utzaal long before its fall.
FlavourText.zh: 早在乌扎尔陷落之前，卡马萨邪教便已在此盘踞。

FlavourText.en: Remnants of Vaal artifice still remain.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔的神奇技艺依然留存着只鳞片爪。

FlavourText.en: Bleak heights overlook a devastated land.
FlavourText.zh: 荒凉的高地俯瞰着满目疮痍的大地。

FlavourText.en: Life still clings to the highest places.
FlavourText.zh: 生命仍在至高处顽强存续。

FlavourText.en: As separate worlds draw ever closer, the Nameless gather at the edge of existence.
FlavourText.zh: 随着诸界日益临近，无名者聚于存在的边缘。

FlavourText.en: The prismatic patterns of Time shimmer and coalesce in vast geodes hidden from sight.
FlavourText.zh: 时间的虹彩在隐秘的巨型晶洞中闪烁凝聚。

FlavourText.en:
<i>{"Sons from foreign shores}
<i>{Took refuge from the storm}
<i>{Bringing knowledge of runes}
<i>{Our fate was carved soon."} 
- Ezomyte Folklore
FlavourText.zh:
<i>{“异邦之子远渡重洋}
<i>{避风暴之灾殃}
<i>{携符文之智识}
<i>{铸吾等之命章。"} 
——艾兹麦民谣

FlavourText.en: The Spirit guides the mountain-born.
FlavourText.zh: 万灵指引着山岳之子。

FlavourText.en: A mirror is a perfect prison for one's sense of self... until it cracks.
FlavourText.zh: 镜子是自我意识的完美牢笼……直到它碎裂。

FlavourText.en: Beware a chill colder than death itself.
FlavourText.zh: 当心比死亡本身更冰冷的寒意。

FlavourText.en: The Cataclysm tore the land asunder.
FlavourText.zh: 灾变将大地撕裂。

FlavourText.en: A rare enclave of fertile earth.
FlavourText.zh: 一处罕见的沃土飞地。

FlavourText.en: A refuge from the villains it once contained.
FlavourText.zh: 曾囚恶徒之所，今成其避难之地。

FlavourText.en: Valako kept them here, to perfect their skills for war... but the Blood Fever consumed them.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦拉克将他们留于此地，精进战技……但血热病吞噬了他们。

SpecialMapFlavourText.en: Within the storm, warriors can be seen, heard and feared.
SpecialMapFlavourText.zh: 风暴之中，可见战士的身影，可闻其战吼，可感其威压。

SpecialMapHelpText.en: Find and activate a Karui Beacon in a nearby Map to remove the Maelstrom and gain access to this Map.
SpecialMapHelpText.zh: 在附近的地图中找到并激活一个卡鲁信标，以驱散大漩涡，进入此地图。

FlavourText.en: The Temporal's tongue captures the ear of those vying for power.
FlavourText.zh: 时空之舌攫住了那些争权夺利者的耳朵。

SpecialMapFlavourText.en: The Temporal's tongue captures the ear of those vying for power.
SpecialMapFlavourText.zh: 时空之舌攫住了那些争权夺利者的耳朵。

SpecialMapHelpText.en: Find and activate Temporal Tethers in nearby Maps to dispel the Sandstorm and gain access to this Map.
SpecialMapHelpText.zh: 在附近的地图中找到并激活时光套索，以驱散沙暴，进入此地图。

FlavourText.en: Darkness always finds its way into the minds of the weak.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗总能侵入弱者的心智。

SpecialMapFlavourText.en: Dead litter the surrounding woods, their blood drained and taken.
SpecialMapFlavourText.zh: 周围的树林中横陈着死者，血液已被抽干取尽。

SpecialMapHelpText.en:
Lure nearby Draiocht Wisps to this Mansion to purge the evil surrounding it.
Draiocht Wisps can be lured closer by completing Maps that they gather about.
SpecialMapHelpText.zh:
将附近的德莱契鬼灵引至这座豪邸，以净化周围的邪祟。
德莱契鬼灵会聚集在地图周围，完成这些地图即可将其引近。

FlavourText.en: The Vaal who survived the Cataclysm must now survive each other.
FlavourText.zh: 在灾变中幸存的瓦尔人，如今必须在彼此之间求存。

SpecialMapFlavourText.en: Closed and forgotten to time, the Vault holds living secrets.
SpecialMapFlavourText.zh: 尘封已久、被时光遗忘的宝库，其中蕴藏着鲜活的秘密。

SpecialMapHelpText.en: Find and activate a Vessel of Estazunti in one of the connected Maps to access the Sealed Vault.
SpecialMapHelpText.zh: 在附近的地图中找到并激活埃斯塔祖提的容器，即可进入封印宝库。

FlavourText.en: Where nomads share tales of a time before drought.
FlavourText.zh: 游牧民在此讲述干旱之前的故事。

FlavourText.en: A garden bereft of its gardener still grows as it pleases.
FlavourText.zh: 失去园丁的花园，依旧肆意生长。

FlavourText.en: Merchants and pirates alike need a safe port to peddle their wares.
FlavourText.zh: 商贾与海盗皆需一处安全的港口兜售货物。

FlavourText.en: In the end, the river will always conquer the dam.
FlavourText.zh: 河流终将征服堤坝。

FlavourText.en: In these lands, a pure water source is the most valuable treasure.
FlavourText.zh: 在这片土地上，纯净的水源便是最珍贵的宝藏。

FlavourText.en: The bones of marooned wanderers assemble here.
FlavourText.zh: 被困于此的流浪者，骸骨在此汇聚。

FlavourText.en: We know the minds of generations past only by the works they left behind.
FlavourText.zh: 我们对先辈思想的了解，仅来自他们留下的作品。

FlavourText.en: The grandest sculptures are carved with neither hammer nor chisel.
FlavourText.zh: 最宏伟的雕塑，并非以锤凿雕就。

FlavourText.en: Spirits gather where the world falls away.
FlavourText.zh: 灵魂在世界分崩离析之处聚集。

FlavourText.en: An undrinkable lagoon girt in unbreathable air.
FlavourText.zh: 一片无法饮用的环礁湖，环绕着令人窒息的空气。

FlavourText.en: Violent seas and hungry shores devour vessels, crew and all.
FlavourText.zh: 狂暴的海洋与饥渴的海岸，吞噬着船只与船员。

FlavourText.en: Our world is becoming... their world.
FlavourText.zh: 我们的世界正在变成……他们的世界。

FlavourText.en: A rare chance to strike back at the horde...
FlavourText.zh: 反击虫群的良机难得一遇……

FlavourText.en: Silent and imposing, it dominates the landscape.
FlavourText.zh: 它沉默而威严，主宰着这片大地。

FlavourText.en: Long lost secrets lie buried beyond.
FlavourText.zh: 久远的秘密埋藏在彼岸。

FlavourText.en: What kind of people could have built such a thing?
FlavourText.zh: 什么样的人才能造出这样的东西？

FlavourText.en: Perhaps the truth of history may be found within.
FlavourText.zh: 或许，历史的真相就藏于其中。

FlavourText.en: One cannot create life without the power to take it.
FlavourText.zh: 若无夺取生命之力，便无法创造生命。

FlavourText.en: One cannot take life without the power to create it.
FlavourText.zh: 若无创造生命之力，便无法夺取生命。

FlavourText.en: Within lies power beyond comprehension.
FlavourText.zh: 其中蕴藏着超乎认知的力量。

FlavourText.en: Where reality begins and ends is uncertain.
FlavourText.zh: 现实始于何处、终于何处，无人知晓。

FlavourText.en: Your eyes betray you at every turn.
FlavourText.zh: 你的双眼处处都在背叛你。

FlavourText.en: There is no bleaker tundra than a city at night.
FlavourText.zh: 没有比夜晚的城市更阴冷的荒原了。

FlavourText.en: Fell blooms and grasping roots grow in shadow.
FlavourText.zh: 邪恶的花朵与攫取的根须在阴影中滋生。

FlavourText.en: Haunting echoes carry a song of sorrow...
FlavourText.zh: 萦绕的回声传唱着哀伤的歌谣……

FlavourText.en: They scrabble and dig; they know not why...
FlavourText.zh: 他们胡乱扒挖，却不知为何……

FlavourText.en: The sea returns everything eventually. Even the dead.
FlavourText.zh: 大海终将归还一切，甚至死者。

FlavourText.en: Cruel time and change, now plains only in name.
FlavourText.zh: 无情的时光与变迁，如今平原徒有其名。

FlavourText.en: Live by the power of Corruption... die by madness.
FlavourText.zh: 借腐化之力而生……终将因疯狂而死。

FlavourText.en: The air is acrid. The skin burns. No doubt... sulphite.
FlavourText.zh: 空气刺鼻，皮肤灼烧。毫无疑问……是亚硫酸。

FlavourText.en: It's always raining, but the channels never fill...
FlavourText.zh: 雨一直下，但沟渠永远填不满……

FlavourText.en: Calm, bleak twilight holds only despair.
FlavourText.zh: 平静、阴郁的暮色只带来绝望。

FlavourText.en: A mad Thane rules over ruin.
FlavourText.zh: 一个疯癫的领主统治着废墟。

FlavourText.en: Follow in her footsteps... if you dare.
FlavourText.zh: 跟随她的足迹……如果你敢。

FlavourText.en: It continues still, its purpose unknown.
FlavourText.zh: 它仍在运转，目的不明。

FlavourText.en: When does protection become a prison?
FlavourText.zh: 保护何时会变成囚笼？

FlavourText.en: Something rumbles in the lava-lit gloom.
FlavourText.zh: 有什么在熔岩照亮的幽暗中隆隆作响。

FlavourText.en: The felling continues, unto insanity.
FlavourText.zh: 砍伐仍在继续，直至疯狂。

FlavourText.en: This cavern burns hot and deadly.
FlavourText.zh: 这座洞穴炽热而致命。

FlavourText.en: Exactly as you remember it...
FlavourText.zh: 正如你记忆中的那样……

FlavourText.en: This lonely island lay untouched for centuries.
FlavourText.zh: 这座孤岛数个世纪以来无人踏足。

FlavourText.en:
Delusions of suffering...
and death.
FlavourText.zh:
“痛苦……
与死亡的妄想。”

FlavourText.en: What ruin the sky wreaks...
FlavourText.zh: 天空降下了怎样的灾厄……

FlavourText.en: And it shall be a legendary battle!
FlavourText.zh: 这将是一场传奇般的战斗！

FlavourText.en: Through the Dreamer they see their path.
FlavourText.zh: 透过幻梦者，他们看到了自己的道路。

FlavourText.en: Heroes of many different cultures gather to save the world.
FlavourText.zh: 来自不同文化的英雄们齐聚一堂，拯救世界。

FlavourText.en: Once the heart of Druidic power and culture...
FlavourText.zh: 曾是德鲁伊力量与文化的中心……

FlavourText.en: A gnarled tree reflects a terrifying truth.
FlavourText.zh: 一棵虬结的树，倒映出可怖的真相。

FlavourText.en: From anywhere, and everywhere, it is... down.
FlavourText.zh: 无论从何处来，往何处去，它终究是……向下。

FlavourText.en: The secrets of the Vaal await an intrepid explorer.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔的秘密等待着无畏的探索者。

FlavourText.en: Ancient treasures await.
FlavourText.zh: 上古奇珍，唾手可得。

FlavourText.en: Secrets and shadows...
FlavourText.zh: 秘密与阴影……

FlavourText.en: Drown in the black waters of nightmare...
FlavourText.zh: 沉溺于梦魇的黑水之中……

FlavourText.en: Madness has no home.
FlavourText.zh: 疯狂无处为家。

FlavourText.en: What once was, shall be again.
FlavourText.zh: 过去曾有的，必将再次降临。

FlavourText.en: Her one-woman crusade continues still.
FlavourText.zh: 她孤身一人的圣战仍在继续。

FlavourText.en: What lies beyond the limits of mortal understanding?
FlavourText.zh: 凡人的理解之外究竟有何物？

FlavourText.en: The truth lies somewhere between light and shadow.
FlavourText.zh: 真相潜藏于光与影之间。

FlavourText.en: There is no how, or why, or when. Only awe.
FlavourText.zh: 没有如何，没有为何，没有何时。唯有敬畏。

FlavourText.en: There is no how, or why, or when. Only awe.
FlavourText.zh: 没有如何，没有为何，没有何时。唯有敬畏。

FlavourText.en: There is no how, or why, or when. Only awe.
FlavourText.zh: 没有如何，没有为何，没有何时。唯有敬畏。

FlavourText.en: There is no how, or why, or when. Only awe.
FlavourText.zh: 没有如何，没有为何，没有何时。唯有敬畏。

FlavourText.en: There is no how, or why, or when. Only awe.
FlavourText.zh: 没有如何，没有为何，没有何时。唯有敬畏。

FlavourText.en: On the crumbling edge of meaning, He awaits.
FlavourText.zh: 在意义崩解的边缘，他等待着。

FlavourText.en: The crumbling landscape reveals what lies beneath...
FlavourText.zh: 崩裂的大地露出了底下的东西……

FlavourText.en: You will find what they did not.
FlavourText.zh: 你会找到他们未能发现之物。

FlavourText.en: The past lies piled under dirt and rot.
FlavourText.zh: 过去掩埋于尘土与腐烂之下。

FlavourText.en: Traces of history remain.
FlavourText.zh: 历史的痕迹依然留存。

FlavourText.en: On the edge of the sea, the dead are closest to home.
FlavourText.zh: 在海的边缘，亡者离故乡最近。

FlavourText.en: The land has forgotten what came before.
FlavourText.zh: 这片土地已遗忘了往昔。

FlavourText.en: They came by ship... and they never left.
FlavourText.zh: 他们乘船而来……却再未离去。

FlavourText.en: Life roils over layers of bones.
FlavourText.zh: 生命在层层骸骨之上翻涌。

FlavourText.en: This place was not always so bleak.
FlavourText.zh: 此地并非一直如此荒凉。

FlavourText.en: The past lies untouched where the living dare not tread.
FlavourText.zh: 生者不敢踏足之处，过去安然沉睡。

FlavourText.en: They dig not to discover, but to escape.
FlavourText.zh: 他们挖掘不是为了发现，而是为了逃离。

FlavourText.en: The chill is second only to the stench.
FlavourText.zh: 寒意仅次于恶臭。

FlavourText.en: Strife and terror rule the night.
FlavourText.zh: 纷争与恐惧统治着黑夜。

FlavourText.en: Only the shadow of death lives here now.
FlavourText.zh: 如今只有死亡的阴影居住于此。

FlavourText.en: There is beauty to be found in the depths.
FlavourText.zh: 在深处也能发现美。

FlavourText.en: These halls weren't meant for you...
FlavourText.zh: 这些殿堂并非为你而设……

FlavourText.en: One cannot create life without the power to take it.
FlavourText.zh: 若无夺取生命之力，便无法创造生命。

FlavourText.en: One cannot take life without the power to create it.
FlavourText.zh: 若无创造生命之力，便无法夺取生命。

FlavourText.en: Selfless ancients gave themselves to save tomorrow.
FlavourText.zh: 无私的先祖献出自身，只为拯救未来。

FlavourText.en: These gates have facilitated many trades. Silks, spices, and now horrors.
FlavourText.zh: 这些大门曾促成无数交易。丝绸，香料，如今则是恐惧。

FlavourText.en: A sanctuary for the unsanctified.
FlavourText.zh: 不洁者的避难所。
